title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ITC Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ITC Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
